description: Plugin-distributed hooks for k12-school-administration. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the plugin's install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: review this K-12 School Administration deliverable against the §3 house opinions (baseline on every metric, source+date on every benchmark, no student PII (FERPA)). Set K12_SCHOOL_ADMINISTRATION_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
